summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KOLOR STUDIO pre-launch features. All 11 requested features verified successfully: Help menu, Feedback modal, Announcement banner, Status indicator, Testimonials, Comparison table, Trust section, FAQ, and Email capture.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with Help menu visible in header
Help menu dropdown opens and shows: Report Bug, Request Feature, Documentation, Contact Support
Clicking Report Bug opens the Feedback modal
Feedback modal has form with type selection (Bug/Feature/General), title, description, email fields
Feedback modal displays helpful tips for bug reports
Announcement banner appears at top of dashboard: 'Welcome to KOLOR STUDIO!'
Announcement banner can be dismissed via X button
Landing page displays Testimonials section with heading 'What our users say'
Landing page displays 3 testimonial cards: Sarah Chen, Marcus Williams, Emma Rodriguez
Landing page displays Comparison table: KOLOR STUDIO vs. Spreadsheets with 6 comparison rows
Landing page displays Trust & Security section with heading 'Your data is safe with us'
Landing page displays 3 trust cards: 256-bit Encryption, GDPR Compliant, Daily Backups
Landing page displays FAQ section with heading 'Frequently Asked Questions'
Landing page displays 5 expandable FAQ questions
FAQ questions expand/collapse correctly when clicked
Landing page displays Email capture section with heading 'Stay in the loop'
Email capture has input field and Subscribe button
Email subscription shows success message: 'Thanks! You're on the list.'
Footer displays Status indicator showing 'All Systems Operational' with green dot
critical_code_review_comments: All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
HelpMenu correctly passes onOpenFeedback callback to trigger FeedbackModal
AnnouncementBanner properly uses localStorage to persist dismissed state
StatusIndicator correctly polls /api/health endpoint every 60 seconds
Vercel Analytics integration visible in console logs - tracking events working in debug mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-launch features fully verified. Help menu with 4 options (Report Bug, Request Feature, Documentation, Contact Support). Feedback modal with 3 types and validation. Announcement banner with localStorage persistence. Landing page enhanced with Testimonials (3), Comparison table (6 rows), Trust cards (3), FAQ (5), and Email capture with success state. Footer has working StatusIndicator polling /api/health.
data_testid_elements_verified: help-menu-button - Opens help dropdown in dashboard header
report-bug-btn - Opens FeedbackModal in bug mode
request-feature-btn - Opens FeedbackModal in feature mode
dismiss-announcement - X button to dismiss banner
status-indicator - Footer status with green/yellow/red indicator

dashboard.help_menu: 4 options: Report Bug, Request Feature, Documentation, Contact Support + version info
dashboard.feedback_modal: 3 types with form validation, tips for bug reports, Submit Feedback button
dashboard.announcement_banner: Celebration type, dismissible, persists in localStorage

landing_page.testimonials: 3 cards with 5-star ratings, quotes, author names and roles
landing_page.comparison_table: 6 rows comparing Spreadsheets vs KOLOR STUDIO with X/checkmark icons
landing_page.trust_section: 3 cards: 256-bit Encryption, GDPR Compliant, Daily Backups
landing_page.email_capture: Input + Subscribe button, success state with checkmark

footer.status_indicator: Real-time status from /api/health - shows 'All Systems Operational'

analytics_note: Vercel Analytics integration confirmed in console logs - debug mode active in development. Custom event tracking (Login Success, etc.) visible in logs.
